titleStmt.title: SII 36.269: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 269. (A.R. No. 269 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of 12 kaḻañcus of gold by Tiruvaḍigaḷ Vaikunthan from Talaicayanappuram alias Taiyyūr, a taṉkūṟu in Āmūrk-kōṭṭam for a lamp. The ūr and sabhā of Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam, received the gold and agreed to maintain the lamp by providing an annual supply of 90 naḻis of ghee.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kopparakecariven=tirātipanmarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Āmūrk koṭṭattu
p paṭuvūr nāṭṭu tevatāṉa tiruviṭavantai cavaiyomum Ūromum kaiyeḻuttu
Ik koṭṭattu taṉkūṟṟun=talaicayanappuṟamāṉa taiyūr cavaiyyom kiruṣṇa tiruvaṭikaḷ vaiy
kun=taṉ pakkali yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭavapoṉ E panniru kaḻañcu pon Ippoṉṉāl van=ta
palicai Ēṟṟit toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney Eṇṇai Āṭṭai vaṭṭam Aṭṭuvomānom Ivveṇṇai
nittam Uḻakku Eṇṇaikku Oru tirunan=tāviḷakku can=tirātittavaṟrerippippatānōm Ivviḷakku Onṟu mu
ṭṭāme Erippomānom Āṭṭaivaṭṭan toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney Eṇṇai Aṭṭuvomā
nom cavaiyomum Ūrromum Itirunun=tāviḷakku celuttomākil tānmasaṉattile nitta
ṅ kāṟ pon maṉṟa Iṭṭuk kuṭuttom Itu Anreṉpārkku keṅkai Iṭaik kumari yiṭai Eḻu
nūṟṟuk kātamāṅ naṭuvu ceytār ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvār Ittarmam rakṣippār śrīpātame
ṉ talaimelatu Aṟamaṟavaṟka
Digital edition of SII 36.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
